test_name: Happy path — funnel_conversion report for HEAD scope
preconditions: Org has 20 leads seeded across May 2026: 8 captured, 5 handed_off, 4 rejected, 3 active in pipeline
test_steps: Authenticate as HEAD user and obtain JWT
Assert response envelope: { data: { code: 'funnel_conversion', rows: [...] }, meta: { pagination: {...} }, error: null }
Assert each row has: product_code, captured, handed_off, rejected, active_pipeline, overall_conversion_pct
Assert active_pipeline = captured - handed_off - rejected for each row
Assert meta.pagination contains page, limit, total fields
expected_result: HTTP 200; data.rows non-empty; active_pipeline = captured - handed_off - rejected per row; meta.pagination.total >= seeded count; error null
postconditions: No rows written to stage_history, audit_logs, event_outbox, or leads (read-only op)
INV-01: SELECT count(*) FROM stage_history WHERE created_at > now() - interval '5 seconds' = 0
INV-02: SELECT count(*) FROM audit_logs WHERE created_at > now() - interval '5 seconds' = 0

test_name: Zero-denominator returns '–' not '0' or NaN
preconditions: One product code (e.g. 'LAP') has captured = 0 for the requested period
test_steps: Seed 1 lead with product_code='PL' (not 'LAP'); leave 'LAP' with zero leads in period
Assert active_pipeline === 0 or omitted (not NaN or undefined)
expected_result: Row for product_code='LAP': overall_conversion_pct='–', kyc_conversion_pct='–'; values are not '0', '0%', 'NaN', 'null', or empty string

test_name: Scope enforcement — RM forced to own leads only
test_steps: Assert data.rows contains only leads owned by rm-user-uuid-001
Assert no row references rm-user-uuid-002 data
expected_result: HTTP 200; data.rows shows only RM rm-user-uuid-001's data; total_leads = 3; no other RM's leads included

test_name: Scope violation — RM passes another RM's owner_id
preconditions: Another RM rm-user-uuid-002 exists in same org
expected_result: HTTP 403; error.code='FORBIDDEN'; no data returned
postconditions: No writes to any table; no data for rm-user-uuid-002 exposed

test_name: Scope violation — BM passes another branch_id
preconditions: BM user bm-user-uuid-001 belongs to branch branch-A-uuid
expected_result: HTTP 403; error.code='FORBIDDEN'

test_name: ADMIN role denied — no reports capability
preconditions: ADMIN JWT available (ADMIN has no 'reports' capability per auth-matrix.json)
expected_result: HTTP 403; error.code='FORBIDDEN'

test_name: Unauthenticated request returns 401
test_steps: Send GET /api/v1/reports/funnel_conversion with no Authorization header
expected_result: HTTP 401; error.code='AUTH_REQUIRED'

test_name: Invalid report code returns VALIDATION_ERROR
expected_result: HTTP 400; error.code='VALIDATION_ERROR'; error.fields[0].field='code'

test_name: Date range inversion returns VALIDATION_ERROR
test_steps: Assert error.fields contains entry for 'from' or 'to'
expected_result: HTTP 400; error.code='VALIDATION_ERROR'; fields references 'from' or 'to'

test_name: Empty state — no data in requested period
preconditions: No leads exist in the org for the requested date range (2020-01-01 to 2020-01-31)
test_steps: Assert data.rows is an empty array []
expected_result: HTTP 200; data.rows=[]; meta.pagination.total=0; no error

test_name: Pagination — page 2 returns correct slice and correct meta
preconditions: Org has 7 distinct product rows in rejection_summary report
test_steps: Assert row IDs do not overlap with page 1 results
expected_result: HTTP 200; data.rows.length=3; meta.pagination.page=2; meta.pagination.total=7; no row_id overlap with page 1

test_name: Reconciliation — captured = active_pipeline + rejected + handed_off
preconditions: Seed 15 leads for May 2026: 6 active_pipeline, 5 handed_off, 4 rejected
test_steps: For each row: assert row.active_pipeline + row.handed_off + row.rejected = row.captured
Sum all rows: total_captured = sum(row.captured); total_active + total_handed_off + total_rejected = total_captured

Run SQL invariant: SELECT (COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE stage NOT IN ('handed_off','rejected') AND deleted_at IS NULL) + COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE stage='rejected') + COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE stage='handed_off')) - COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE deleted_at IS NULL) AS delta FROM leads WHERE org_id='<org-uuid>' AND created_at BETWEEN '2026-05-01' AND '2026-05-31 23:59:59'; EXPECT: 0
expected_result: For each row: active_pipeline + rejected + handed_off = captured; SQL reconciliation delta = 0

di_meta.setup_sql: INSERT INTO leads ... (15 rows with stages as seeded)
di_meta.invariant_query: SELECT (COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE stage NOT IN ('handed_off','rejected') AND deleted_at IS NULL) + COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE stage='rejected') + COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE stage='handed_off')) - COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE deleted_at IS NULL) AS delta FROM leads WHERE org_id='00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001' AND created_at BETWEEN '2026-05-01' AND '2026-05-31 23:59:59'
di_meta.cleanup: DELETE FROM leads WHERE created_at BETWEEN '2026-05-01' AND '2026-05-31'

test_name: Happy path — create queued export below threshold
test_steps: POST /api/v1/exports with body: { report_code:'funnel_conversion', filters:{date_from:'2026-05-01',date_to:'2026-05-31'}, scope:'A', masking_level:'partial', purpose:'monthly_review' }
Query DB: SELECT status FROM export_jobs WHERE export_job_id=<id>; expect 'queued'
Query audit_logs: SELECT * WHERE entity_id=<id> AND action='export_generate'; expect 1 row
Assert audit_logs.detail does not contain PAN or mobile in plaintext
expected_result: HTTP 202; status='queued'; audit_log written with action='export_generate'; no PII in audit detail

di_meta.setup_sql: -- No special setup; relies on seed org and HEAD user
di_meta.invariant_query: SELECT export_job_id FROM export_jobs ej LEFT JOIN audit_logs al ON al.entity_id = ej.export_job_id AND al.action = 'export_generate' WHERE al.audit_id IS NULL

test_name: Approval gate — unmasked PII triggers awaiting_approval + 409
preconditions: masking_level = 'unmasked' requires approval per governance config
test_steps: POST /api/v1/exports with body: { report_code:'consent_ops', filters:{date_from:'2026-01-01',date_to:'2026-05-31'}, scope:'A', masking_level:'unmasked', purpose:'regulatory_audit' } with DPO JWT
Query DB: SELECT status, approver_id FROM export_jobs WHERE export_job_id=<id>
expected_result: HTTP 409; CONFLICT / EXPORT_APPROVAL_REQUIRED; job row in awaiting_approval with approver_id=NULL

di_meta.invariant_query: SELECT export_job_id FROM export_jobs WHERE status = 'awaiting_approval' AND approver_id IS NOT NULL
di_meta.cleanup: DELETE FROM export_jobs WHERE masking_level = 'unmasked' AND status = 'awaiting_approval'

test_name: Approval gate — row count at threshold triggers awaiting_approval
test_steps: POST /api/v1/exports with HEAD JWT; mock EstimateRowCount to return 1000
expected_result: HTTP 409; EXPORT_APPROVAL_REQUIRED; row at threshold = at-or-above triggers approval

test_name: Boundary — row count one below threshold does NOT trigger approval
test_steps: POST /api/v1/exports with HEAD JWT; mock EstimateRowCount to return 999
expected_result: HTTP 202; status='queued'; no approval required

test_name: Approval workflow — happy path (approve transitions awaiting_approval to queued)
preconditions: Export job in awaiting_approval state, requested by DPO (dpo-uuid)
Approver SM (sm-uuid) has scope covering requester's scope
test_steps: Query DB: SELECT status, approver_id FROM export_jobs WHERE export_job_id=<uuid>
Assert audit_log row for approval action exists
expected_result: HTTP 200; job.status='queued'; job.approver_id='sm-uuid'; audit log written
postconditions: Cloud Tasks job enqueued for export generation

test_name: Self-approval blocked — requester cannot approve own job
preconditions: Export job in awaiting_approval state requested by DPO (dpo-uuid)
test_steps: POST /api/v1/exports/<job-uuid>/approve with DPO JWT (same user as requested_by)
Query DB: approver_id IS NULL; status = 'awaiting_approval'
expected_result: HTTP 403; FORBIDDEN; approver_id still null; status unchanged
postconditions: INV: SELECT export_job_id FROM export_jobs WHERE approver_id = requested_by -- expects 0 rows

di_meta.invariant_query: SELECT export_job_id FROM export_jobs WHERE approver_id IS NOT NULL AND approver_id = requested_by

test_name: ExportJob lifecycle — queued→running→completed with artefact and outbox event
preconditions: Export job in status='queued' with valid filters
test_steps: Trigger async export worker for queued job (invoke exportGenerationTask.run(<id>))
Assert export_jobs.status transitions: queued → running → completed
Assert artefact_ref is non-null after completion
Assert row_count is non-null after completion
Assert event_outbox row with event_code='EXPORT_COMPLETED' and aggregate_id=<job-uuid> exists
Assert audit_logs has entry for export_generate completion
expected_result: status='completed'; artefact_ref set; row_count set; EXPORT_COMPLETED in outbox

di_meta.invariant_query: SELECT export_job_id FROM export_jobs WHERE status='completed' AND artefact_ref IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT export_job_id FROM export_jobs WHERE status='completed' AND row_count IS NULL

test_name: Download — signed URL returned; artefact_ref NOT exposed; audit log written
preconditions: Export job in status='completed' with artefact_ref='gs://bucket/path.csv'
test_steps: Assert response.data.download_url is a signed URL (starts with https://storage.googleapis.com or similar)
Assert response.data does NOT contain artefact_ref key
Assert audit_logs has entry with action='export_download' and entity_id=<job-uuid>
expected_result: HTTP 200; download_url is signed URL; artefact_ref absent from response body; audit_log action='export_download'

test_name: Masking — partial masking in generated file

Assert non-PII columns (branch, product_code) are intact

expected_result: pan_masked matches masked pattern; mobile matches masked pattern; branch='Mumbai' unchanged

Assert server error was logged with correlation_id and export_job_id
expected_result: status='failed'; artefact_ref=null; no EXPORT_COMPLETED event; error logged

test_name: Data Integrity — audit_logs append-only (no rows updated or deleted by this FR)
preconditions: Baseline audit_log row count recorded before tests
test_steps: Record count_before = SELECT COUNT(*) FROM audit_logs
Execute 5 GET /api/v1/audit requests with various filters
Assert count_after >= count_before (only additions allowed, no deletions)
Run: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM audit_logs WHERE org_id IS NULL; expect 0
